name: my-soso
description: A personal finance agent that lives in your chat app — Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp.

scripts.dev: (pnpm redis:up || echo 'Redis failed to start. Ensure Docker/Podman is running.') && turbo run dev
scripts.dev:edge: (pnpm redis:up || echo 'Redis failed to start.') && pnpm --filter @my-soso/edge dev
scripts.dev:worker: (pnpm redis:up || echo 'Redis failed to start.') && pnpm --filter @my-soso/worker dev
scripts.dev:api: (pnpm redis:up || echo 'Redis failed to start.') && pnpm --filter @my-soso/api dev
scripts.redis:up: sh -c 'if command -v podman >/dev/null 2>&1; then podman compose -f compose.redis.yaml up -d; else docker compose -f compose.redis.yaml up -d; fi'
scripts.redis:down: sh -c 'if command -v podman >/dev/null 2>&1; then podman compose -f compose.redis.yaml down; else docker compose -f compose.redis.yaml down; fi'
scripts.redis:logs: sh -c 'if command -v podman >/dev/null 2>&1; then podman compose -f compose.redis.yaml logs -f redis; else docker compose -f compose.redis.yaml logs -f redis; fi'
